examples: He has not been unmindful of these requirements.
From this, one's unmindful ness of the way can be known.
However, when people are no longer unmindful, they have already missed it all.
Unmindful of such dark prophecies, the state government has moved determinedly ahead inviting bids to construct the second part of the freeway.
As the industry morphs into a private-sector play area, it is attracting a new class of managers--young, idealistic and unmindful of national boundaries.
